title: Mai Sakurajima Totem V2 (Bunny costume - Bunny Girl Sempai)
description: Now you can replace your totem with mai sakurajima with a bunny costume from rascal does not dream of a bunny girl sempai
body:
🐰 Mai Sakurajima Totem Resourcepack — *Bunny Girl Senpai Edition*  
Carry mystery and elegance—replace your Totem of Undying with Mai Sakurajima in her iconic bunny costume from *Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai*!  
This resourcepack transforms the vanilla totem into Mai, perfect for fans of her graceful presence and supernatural intrigue.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces the Totem of Undying with Mai Sakurajima.
🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.16+
